navigation.volume_url_pattern: /law_reviews/environmental_law/past_issues/{volume_N}/ (case varies: volume_NN, Volume_NN; some nest /volume-NN/ subpath; older volumes use /index.php)
navigation.notes: Lewis & Clark LiveWhale CMS. PDFs hosted as /live/files/{id}-{slug} with no .pdf extension. Volume URL casing inconsistent (volume_NN vs Volume_NN); some nest /volume-NN/, older volumes use /index.php. Volumes 1-55 visible on past_issues index. Mirrors animallawreview-lclark-edu.json structure but with one more level (issue page between volume and PDF). Re-onboard: previously empty placeholder seed; now populated.
